MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Julie Templeton (Trustee).

Ms. Ng stated that her Client was working with an Investor to re-evaluate the portfolio. The Court approved the tenth account, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was reduced to $276,000.00.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR#13358. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
